questions.question_text:
With the help of the given outlines construct a story in about 100 words:


Outlines: A crow finds a piece of cheese....flies to a tree..... a fox sees the crow ......praises the crow....requests for a song...... the crow opens its beak....cheese falls down......eats up_ and runs away.

With the help of the given outlines, develop a short story:
Old peasant ____ all his sons lazy _____ peasant dying ______ called all his sons _____ told them of a treasure _____ hidden in the fields _____ to find it they must dig for it ______ then died _____ sons dug every bit of the land _____ no treasure ______ showed the corn _____ a very fine crop _____ sons learnt the lesson ____ what?

Develop a story on the given outlines :


The farmer had four sons—brothers kept quarrelling—farmer wanted to teach a lesson—gave them one stick each to break—easily broke—gave a pile of sticks—could not break—learnt a lesson.

With the help of the given outline, develop a short story:
A crow finds a piece of cheese____flies to a tree____ a hungry fox sees the crow____ thinks of a plan____praises him____ requests him to sing____ the crow very pleased ____ open its beak____ the cheese fell down____fox picks up ____ runs away.

With the help of the given outline, develop a short story:
Old peasant____all his sons lazy_____peasant dying____ called all his sons_____ told them of a treasure____hidden in the fields____ to find it they must dig for it____ then died____sons dug every bit of the land_____no treasure_____sowed the corn ____a very fine crop_____sons learnt the lesson _____what?

With the help of the given outlines, develop a short story:
A boy falls in bad company____father brings apples____ put them in the cupboard ____places a rotten apple among them____ next day all apples rotten_____teaches a lesson.

Given below is an outline of the story given in the form of phrases. Fill in the blanks to create the complete story.
A rich man.............had many servants...............purse with a lot of money is stolen from a rich man's drawer...........rich man files a complaint in the police station.............all the servants called...........stick of the same length given to each...............servants told that stick of the thief will grow by one inch overnight............the thief cuts his stick by one inch............he is easily caught the next day.

Given below is an outline of the story given in the form of phrases, develop readable stories:
The mice in a house____afraid of the cat_____hold a meeting____ one proposes to tie a bell round the cat's neck____all agree____ who is to bell the cat? No mouse offers____the cat appears_____all run away.

With the help of the given outlines, develop a short story:
A crow finds a piece of cheese____flies to a tree____ a hungry fox thinks of a plain___ praises him____ requests him to sing____ the ____opens its beak____ the cheese fall down____ fox picks up____

Develop a story on the given outlines:


The farmer had four sons—brothers kept quarrelling—farmer wanted to teach a lesson—gave them one stick each to break—easily broke—gave a pile of sticks—could not break—learnt a lesson.

Given below is the outline of a story. Develop it.


Cap-seller—hot day—tired and thirsty—looking for shade—ten red caps in a bundle—falls asleep—wakes up—caps gone—looks up in wonder—ten monkeys on the tree—each wears a cap— tries several methods to recover caps—no use—snatches the cap off his head—throws it down in anger—monkeys do the same—recovers all his caps.

Given below is the beginning of the story. Complete it in about 80 words.


I had gone to my tuition class in the evening. The weather was pleasant. When I came out of the class to go home, suddenly it became dark and.........

Given below is the outline of a story. Develop it.


A lady becomes blind—calls in a doctor—agrees to pay large fee—doctor calls daily—gives some medicine and removes some furniture—the lady is cured—the doctor demands his fees—lady refuses—sight not restored—no furniture—doctor files a suit—lady's reply—doctor punished.

Develop a story by using the given headings:


Two friends when small were very closely attached to each other—one rich—one poor—after Class X—separated. Meet after 10 years—poor as boss and rich as employee.

With the help of the given outlines construct a story in about 100 words:


Outlines: A fox very hungry....goes in search of food..... reaches a garden......sees grapes......very high....jumps..... cannot reach them ......goes away. Moral.

With the help of the given outlines construct a story in about 100 words :


Outlines: A dog with a piece of meat in his mouth....goes over a plank..... sees his reflection....thinks another dog with a larger piece of meat attempts to snatch it loses his own. Moral.

Given below is the outline of a story, develop an interesting story based on the outline.


Old lion—always hungry—four friends in forest—lion sees them—says he's hungry and wants to eat them—animals scared—Hare cleverest of all—tell the lion about another lion—takes him to the well—lion sees his reflection—Thinks another lion—roars at him—reflection roars back, lion jumps into the well—end of lion— friends happy

Develop a story on the given outlines:


A man—pet dog—man meets with an accident—becomes crippled—dog helps to recover—proves faithfulness.

Develop a story on the given idea:


Two friends when small were very closely attached to each other—one rich—one poor—after Class X—separated. Meet after 10 years—poor as boss and rich as employee.

Give below is an outline of the story given in the form of phrases, develop a readable story.
A shepherd boy looked after a flock of sheep____ cried wolf? For fun____ neighbours gathered in a large number____ no wolf____ the boy laughed at them_____one day wolf really came_____ the boy cried for help_____ neighbours did not believe him_____the wolf killed the boy and his sheep.

Give below is an outline of the story given in the form of phrases, develop readable stories.
Old peasant____all his sons lazy_____peasant dying____ called all his sons_____ told them of a treasure____hidden in the fields_____to find it they must dig for it____ then died____sons dug every bit of the land____ no treasure_____showed the corn ____a very fine crop_____sons learnt the lesson____ what?

Given below is the outline of a story. Develop it.


King of the forest—kills many animals—those escaped in terror—hare's turn— tells the lion about another lion in the forest—lion wants to see him and kill him—hare takes the lion to a deep well—lion sees his reflection—jumps into the well thinking it is the other lion

With the help of the given outlines, develop a short story:
The mice in a house____afraid of the cat_____hold a meeting_____one proposes to tie a bell round the cat's neck____ all agree _____ who is to bell the cat? No mouse offers ______ the cat appears ______ all runaway.

With the help of the given outlines construct a story in about 100 words:


Outlines: Three friends go on a journey find a bag of gold coins one goes to buy food ....eats his own food ...... mixes..... poison...... the other two plan to kill him ..... eat food and die. Moral.

Given below is the outline of a story. Develop it.


A lady becomes blind—calls in a doctor—agrees to pay large fee—doctor calls daily—gives some medicine and removes some furniture—the lady is cured—the doctor demands his fees—lady refuses—sight not restored—no furniture—doctor files a suit—lady's reply—doctor punished.

Develop a story on the given outlines:


A dark stormy night—a traveller reached a house—knocked but no response—knocked hard—a door opened—no lights—no body seen—traveller pulled inside

Develop a story on the following outlines:


A small boy—lives with mother—develops the habit of stealing—Mother does not check—develops the habit when grows—caught—punished

Develop a story on the following outlines:


A small boy—lives with mother—develops the habit of stealing—Mother does not check—develops the habit when grows—caught—punished

With the help of the given outline, develop a short story:
A shepherd boy looked after a flock of sheep cried wolf? For fun_____ neighbors gathered in a large number____ no wolf____ the boy laughed at them_____one day wolf really came____ the boy cried for help_____neighbours didn't believe him_____ the wolf killed the boy and his sheep.
Write a story on the topic A Thirsty Crow.

Give below is an outline of the story given in the form of phrases, develop a readable story.
A boy falls in bad company____father brings apples____ put them in the cupboard ____places a rotten apple among them____ next day all apples rotten____ teaches a lesson. Moral.

Write an interesting story from the given outline.


An ant and grasshopper live in a forest.......grasshopper was enjoying his life..........singing and chirping..........sees ant working hard to collect food.......... asks him why he is working so hard..........says he should also enjoy like him..........and not think of future/winter.....ant advises him to collect food for winter....... didn't listen to the ant.....winter arrives..........no food with grasshopper..........starves..........ants enjoy their food..........grasshopper realises its mistake.....moral.

With the help of the given outlines construct a story in about 100 words:


Outlines: An old farmer near death....sons lazy......farmer worried about their welfare......a plan....tells them there is a treasure hidden in the fields......the farmer dies......the sons dig......no treasure.... but the soil improved....rich crop......understand father's plan ......thankful. Moral.

With the help of the given outlines, develop a short story:
A shepherd boy looked after a flock of sheep____ cried wolf? For fun ______ neighbors gathered in a large number_____no wolf____ the boy laughed at them ____ one day wolf really came____ the boy cried for help______neighbours did not believe him _____ the wolf killed the boy and his sheep.

With the help of the given outlines construct a story in about 100 words:


Outlines: A village boy.... daily takes sheep out for grazing......one day thinks of mischief..... goes up a tree and shouts wolf coming..... people rush to help him no wolf the boy laughs at them another day the same way then one day a wolf comes boy shouts people don't believe....boy eaten up. Moral.
